3208670.name: WEIL
3208670.description: WEIL is an interactive audiovisual experience which seeks to tell a story based on real events about a boy who suffers from depression, verbal and psychological harassment, with this we want to show our players what a person can experience in this type of situations and how this can affect him throughout his life, until he attempts suicide.
